ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient (Male/Female) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information (address, phone number, email) */,
  "emergency_contact_info" TEXT /* Emergency contact information for the patient */,
  "blood_type" TEXT /* Blood type of the patient */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Known allergies of the patient */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the patient in cm */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the patient in kg */,
  "smoker" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient is a smoker */,
  "alcohol_consumer" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient consumes alcohol */,
  "registered_date" TEXT /* Date the patient was registered in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_history" (
  "medical_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical history entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the entry belongs to */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Diagnosis or condition */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment or medication */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome or result */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date the diagnosis was made */,
  "treatment_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the treatment */,
  "treatment_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the treatment */,
  "follow_up_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if follow-up is required */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date of the next follow-up */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medical_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_history_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnosis" (
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnosis */,
  "diagnosis_name" TEXT /* Name of the diagnosis */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the diagnosis */,
  "icd_code" TEXT /* ICD code for the diagnosis */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the diagnosis */,
  "risk_factors" TEXT /* Risk factors associated with the diagnosis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diagnosis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the medication */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage instructions */,
  "pharmaceutical_company" TEXT /* Name of the pharmaceutical company */,
  "active_ingredient" TEXT /* Active ingredient of the medication */,
  "side_effects" TEXT /* Known side effects of the medication */,
  "prescription_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if a prescription is required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "treatment_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment */,
  "procedure_type" TEXT /* Type of procedure (surgical, non-surgical) */,
  "anesthesia_type" TEXT /* Type of anesthesia used */,
  "complications" TEXT /* Complications that occurred during the treatment */,
  "post_treatment_care" TEXT /* Post-treatment care instructions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "test_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the result belongs to */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the test */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the test */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the test was taken */,
  "test_description" TEXT /* Description of the test */,
  "test_result_value" REAL /* Numerical value of the test result */,
  "test_result_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the test result */,
  "test_result_normal_range" TEXT /* Normal range for the test result */,
  "performed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("performed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the outcome belongs to */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Diagnosis or condition */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment or medication */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result or outcome */,
  "outcome_date" TEXT /* Date the outcome was recorded */,
  "follow_up_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if follow-up is required */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date of the next follow-up */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outcomes_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_devices" (
  "medical_device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the medical device */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the medical device */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Model of the medical device */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the medical device */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medical_device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g. doctor, nurse, administrator) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_medical_history" (
  "patient_medical_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient medical history entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the entry belongs to */,
  "medical_history_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medical history entry */,
  "recorded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the medical history */,
  "recorded_date" TEXT /* Date the medical history was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_medical_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_medical_history_medical_history_id FOREIGN KEY ("medical_history_id") REFERENCES medical_history ("medical_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_medical_history_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_medical_history_recorded_by FOREIGN KEY ("recorded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_diagnosis" (
  "patient_diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient diagnosis entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the entry belongs to */,
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the diagnosis entry */,
  "diagnosed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who diagnosed the patient */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date the diagnosis was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_diagnosis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_diagnosis_diagnosis_id FOREIGN KEY ("diagnosis_id") REFERENCES diagnosis ("diagnosis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_diagnosis_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_diagnosis_diagnosed_by FOREIGN KEY ("diagnosed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_treatment" (
  "patient_treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient treatment entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the entry belongs to */,
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treatment entry */,
  "prescribed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who prescribed the treatment */,
  "prescription_date" TEXT /* Date the treatment was prescribed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_treatment_treatment_id FOREIGN KEY ("treatment_id") REFERENCES treatments ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_treatment_prescribed_by FOREIGN KEY ("prescribed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_treatment_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
